narrative:
Precinct Mantua Village (precinct in Portage County) has 678 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
